Now I will teach you after.<[silence:60ms]>

After is like sunrise coming when night ends—first dark, then light, but light follows dark.<[silence:60ms]>
If you eat berry, then belly full, belly full is after eating.<[silence:60ms]>
When big rock rolls down hill, crash at bottom is after rolling.<[silence:60ms]>
You throw stick, dog run get stick—dog getting stick is after throw.<[silence:60ms]>
Always:<[silence:80ms]> first one thing, then next thing.<[silence:60ms]> Next thing is after.<[silence:60ms]>
clean_story:
Now I will teach you after.

After is like sunrise coming when night ends—first dark, then light, but light follows dark.
If you eat berry, then belly full, belly full is after eating.
When big rock rolls down hill, crash at bottom is after rolling.
You throw stick, dog run get stick—dog getting stick is after throw.
Always: first one thing, then next thing. Next thing is after.
